data.title: Ukraine's Military Veterans Turn To Ketamine For PTSD Treatment As Advocacy Grows
data.description: Ketamine therapy is providing fast relief for PTSD in Ukraine's military veterans, offering new hope for the war-torn nation's emotional recovery.
